mapper.select: select stock_code from stock_master where stock_code is not null and trim(stock_code) != ''
mapper.insert:
insert into dart_corp_map(corp_code, corp_name, stock_code, modify_date) values
( #{item.corpCode}, #{item.corpName}, #{item.stockCode}, #{item.modifyDate} )
on duplicate key update corp_name = values(corp_name), modify_date = values(modify_date)
